name: White Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle yeast on top of 2 pints tepid water and leave in a warm place for 10-15 minutes until the mixture is frothy.
2. Mix flour and salt.
3. Add yeast and remaining water to the flour mixture. Knead into an elastic dough, adding more water or milk if needed.
4. Turn onto a floured board and knead lightly for 10 minutes until the dough is smooth.
5. Divide dough in half and place in greased bread tins (1 lb each).
6. Cover with a clean cloth and let rise until the dough fills the tins.
7. Bake in a hot oven (450°F or Mark 8) for 15 minutes, then reduce to 400°F or Mark 6 and continue baking for another 20-25 minutes.
8. Loaves are well risen, golden-brown, and hollow-sounding when tapped.
